title: Hatchan Underestimates Zoro
description: On pages 16–18, hatchan underestimates zoro focuses on Zoro, Hatchan, Nami, Usopp as zoro fights Hatchan while still badly wounded, proving his will against a powerful fish-man swordsman.
scene: On pages 16–18, hatchan underestimates zoro focuses on Zoro, Hatchan, Nami, Usopp as zoro fights Hatchan while still badly wounded, proving his will against a powerful fish-man swordsman.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, HACH!! Wake up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How long are you going to be sleeping!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Nnyuuuuul!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You've really pissed me off! I'm going to Butch- er you!

dialogue.speaker: Hatchan
dialogue.text: Did you know that aside aside from one man, I, Hachi of the 6 swords style, am the number 1 swords- man in Fishman Island!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Even if the heavens were to be flipped over, you would have no chance of beating me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: NYU!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: nyu?

dialogue.speaker: Hatchan
dialogue.text: Who're you trying to fight, Hachi?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: 6 swords style? Don't make me laugh.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Just what's so great about that!?

dialogue.speaker: Hatchan
dialogue.text: Let me tell you something, you little octopus!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I've got a man I have to meet no matter what... and until I meet him...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Not even the GRIM REAPER CAN take my life away!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yosaku! Johnny! LEND ME YOUR SWORDS!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You got it!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Allow me to show you my 3 swords style.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I'll kill you, RORONOA ZORO!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: He was alive?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Hmph...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: If that was a 40th level punch just now,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Then the kicks I received from that old geezer all the time were about level 400...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Aghhhhh!

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
